message:
test(proptest): add property tests for robot_idempotency and slo_conformance

proptest_robot_idempotency.rs (42 tests):
- Serde roundtrips for MutationKey, MutationRecord, MutationOutcome, config, telemetry
- Key determinism, prefix, display, action preservation
- Guard dedup semantics: first=Executed, second=Deduplicated, count increments
- Capacity eviction: FIFO oldest-first removal
- TTL expiry: expired keys treated as new, re-execute after expiry
- Failure caching: uncached by default, cached when configured, retry allowed
- Telemetry counter consistency
- Batch check classification
- Key helper factories (send_text, split_pane, close_pane)

proptest_slo_conformance.rs (45 tests):
- Serde roundtrips for SloComparison, SloSeverity, SloMetric, SloDefinition,
  MetricSample, SloEvaluation, TelemetryAuditCheck, AlertFidelityCheck
- SloComparison evaluation correctness for all 4 operators
- SloSeverity total ordering
- SloEvaluator registration/recording/evaluation/window filtering invariants
- Good/bad count consistency, budget exhaustion logic
- TelemetryAuditReport pass/fail count sums, failures() filter
- AlertFidelityCheck precision/recall/F1 bounds and arithmetic
- SloAuditReport conforming/breached composition, render_summary

Also closes beads: ft-29cb (zstd compression bypass), ft-165vw (TOON format),
unblocks ft-1360.1, ft-1u90p.8.7, ft-dr6zv.2.5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
